positive_prompt: original teenage girl impostor standing outside an apartment door at midnight, too calm smile, slightly red tinted eyes, fingertips stained with black mud, hands visible, visual novel portrait, polished anime visual novel character portrait, psychological horror lighting, centered door-view composition, clean linework, original character design, palette of cold cyan rim light, emergency red eyes, deep charcoal shadows, black mud details, uncanny, polite, dangerous, fake human, character design sheet quality, readable silhouette, expressive pose, polished details, masterpiece, best quality, newest, highres, polished anime illustration

workflow_safety.lora_policy: no final game LoRA; prompt-only SDXL txt2img source asset
